description: S38: Prompt Maker UI - Create PromptMakerWidget (sparkle button between + and text input), add makePrompt method to chat_service.dart, integrate into chat_screen.dart. On tap with text: POST /chat/make-prompt and replace input. On tap without text: show tooltip.
steps: Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/prompt_maker_widget.dart with: (a) PromptMakerWidget StatefulWidget with props: currentText (String), onPromptImproved (Function(String)), selectedProvider (String), selectedModel (String), (b) Sparkle button: Icons.auto_awesome 20px, textMuted when no text, persian when input has text, animated subtle pulse when active (AnimationController), padding 4px, (c) On tap with text: show loading indicator on button, call ChatService().makePrompt(), on success call onPromptImproved callback, show toast 'Prompt improved', on error show snackbar, (d) On tap without text: show tooltip 'Type something first'

Add makePrompt method to frontend/lib/data/services/chat_service.dart: Future<String> makePrompt({required String roughText, required String provider, required String model}) that POSTs to /chat/make-prompt with body {rough_text, provider, model} and returns the improved_prompt string from response

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/chat_screen.dart: (a) Import PromptMakerWidget, (b) In _buildInputBar, add PromptMakerWidget between the + button (now FileUploadWidget) and the TextField, with SizedBox(width: 8) spacing, (c) Pass _inputController.text, _selectedProvider, _selectedModel to it, (d) Handle onPromptImproved callback by updating _inputController.text and setState _hasText
acceptance_criteria: prompt_maker_widget.dart exists with sparkle button using Icons.auto_awesome
Button changes color from textMuted to persian based on whether input has text
Tapping with text calls makePrompt service and replaces input on success
chat_service.dart has makePrompt method with proper DioException handling
chat_screen.dart has PromptMakerWidget positioned between + button and TextField
No dynamic types, strict null safety, proper error handling
verification: Review prompt_maker_widget.dart for correct structure and styling
Review chat_service.dart makePrompt method for proper API call pattern
Review chat_screen.dart for correct widget ordering in input bar
Run python3 -m py_compile on any backend Python files if modified
findings: Successfully implemented. Flutter/Dart SDK not available so verification was code review only. No dynamic types, strict null safety, no print statements. Used StatefulWidget with SingleTickerProviderStateMixin for pulse animation. Widget accepts hasText bool for styling and inputController for reading text on tap. FadeTransition used for pulse animation (0.7 to 1.0 opacity). ChatService.makePrompt added with proper DioException handling. PromptMakerWidget placed between FileUploadWidget and TextField in chat_screen input bar.
